dental technologies lab

precision craftsmanship for your practice|

Get Started

who we are

At Dental Technologies Lab, we specialize in crafting custom dental prosthetics with an unwavering commitment to quality. From precision-milled crowns and bridges to hand-layered veneers, every restoration that leaves our lab reflects decades of expertise and a dedication to excellence. We partner with dental practices to deliver restorations that fit perfectly, look natural, and last — because your patients deserve nothing less than the best.

team photo
01

precision

Every restoration is crafted to exact specifications using advanced CAD/CAM technology and meticulous hand-finishing.

02

quality

We use only premium materials and maintain rigorous quality control at every stage of fabrication.

03

partnership

We work closely with your practice to understand your needs and deliver results that exceed expectations.

what we do

Comprehensive restorative solutions crafted with precision and care

01

Crowns & Bridges

Full-contour zirconia, porcelain-fused-to-metal, and all-ceramic crowns and bridges. Each restoration is precision-milled and hand-finished for optimal fit and aesthetics.

02

Veneers & Laminates

Ultra-thin porcelain veneers and laminates that transform smiles. Custom shade-matching and layering techniques deliver lifelike translucency and natural beauty.

03

Implant Restorations

Custom abutments and implant-supported crowns, bridges, and hybrid prosthetics. Compatible with all major implant systems for seamless integration.

04

Dentures & Partials

Full and partial dentures fabricated with premium teeth and characterized gingival tones. Designed for comfort, function, and a natural appearance.

05

Custom Shades

Expert shade-matching services including custom staining, characterization, and photography-assisted color verification to ensure every restoration blends seamlessly.

06

Digital Impressions

We accept digital impressions from all major intraoral scanners. Streamlined digital workflows mean faster turnaround and exceptional accuracy for your cases.

find us

We're located in a quiet residential setting — a deliberate choice that allows us to focus entirely on the craft. Don't let the address surprise you; the quality of work inside speaks for itself.

Get Directions

sending us a case

01

Include a detailed prescription with shade, material preference, and any special instructions.

02

Ensure impressions or digital scans capture clear margins and opposing dentition.

03

Include bite registration and any relevant patient photos for shade reference.

04

Ship using our provided FedEx labels or drop off directly at our lab during business hours.

let's work together

Ready to partner with a lab that puts quality first? Reach out — we'd love to hear about your practice.
